title: Pixel Craft
description: The set of mods that we use on our server.
body:
Introducing the "Pixel Craft Modpack" - a client-side modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience with a focus on quality of life improvements, performance enhancements, and the ability to test your creations in singleplayer before implementing them on our server. This modpack aims to provide a seamless and optimized gameplay experience, allowing you to fully enjoy Minecraft to its fullest potential.

Key Features:

- Performance Enhancements: The modpack includes various performance optimization mods that significantly improve the game's stability and overall performance. Expect reduced lag, faster loading times, and smoother gameplay.

- Quality of Life Improvements: The modpack incorporates a range of mods that add convenient features and streamline gameplay. These improvements include enhanced inventory management, minimaps, improved tooltips, and better control options.

- Building and Creation Tools: With this modpack, you'll have access to a selection of mods that empower your creativity. Experiment with different building techniques and designs in singleplayer before implementing them on a server. Mods like WorldEdit and Litematica provide powerful tools for efficient construction, making complex building projects easier and more enjoyable.

- Visual Enhancements: Immerse yourself in a visually enhanced Minecraft experience. The modpack includes graphical mods that enhance the game's visuals, such as improved shaders, dynamic lighting, realistic textures, and additional visual effects.

By utilizing the "Pixel Craft Modpack", Minecraft players can elevate their gameplay experience with improved performance, a plethora of quality of life improvements, and the freedom to test their creations in singleplayer before introducing them to a server environment. Whether you're a casual builder or an aspiring architect, this modpack is designed to enhance your Minecraft journey while keeping the focus on creativity, efficiency, and enjoyment.
